description: SB Creative raw files: 月次売上報告書（前払印税報告書）PDF is the authoritative INPUT detail source (one EB row per work+volume, net of MG一覧 draws). 【請求書】MG invoice XLSX/PDF and 支払通知書 PDF are summary/audit evidence only and never generate INPUT rows.
notes: Detail rows list 書名 + ロイヤリティ（税込）. Normal-edition, 分冊版, and multiple-price rows of the same work+volume merge by normalized key (NFKC, whitespace/bracket folding, edition markers removed, volume preserved) — never by row adjacency.
A volume-less 分冊版 row binds only to the unique candidate volume in its series; multiple candidates are a parser error.
MG一覧 lists 当期MG取崩額 per MGタイトル (work+volume); the draw is subtracted at the same work+volume granularity before emitting.
No real titles, target months, or amounts may be hardcoded in the parser or this file.
